images.prompt: Create a cartoon with a single frame or image, describing the following: Wow, you built a block tower that's taller than your head and it didn't fall down!. Do not include any words in the cartoon.
Create a cartoon with a single frame or image, describing the following: Building a block tower taller than your teacher that doesn't fall down.. Do not include any words in the cartoon.

Create a cartoon with a single frame or image, describing the following: Your friend built a super tall block tower that almost touched the ceiling and it didn't fall down!. Do not include any words in the cartoon.
